# Websocket Communication

> WebSocket protocol for real-time communication

**Category:** Integration · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** integration · godot

## What this does

WebSocket protocol for real-time communication

Specifies 3 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Websocket Server** — when Listen for connections is requested, then Listen for connections completed.
- **Websocket Client** — when Connect to server is requested, then Connect to server completed.
- **Message Exchange** — when Send and receive text/binary data is requested, then Send and receive text/binary data completed.
